items.title: Dion Dawkins: Josh is Josh, but everybody else has to be better
items.summary: In eight seasons, Josh Allen has won the MVP award once, finished second once and finished third twice.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Joe Root hits unbeaten 99 as England level ODI series with India
items.summary: India 233 all out; England 235-6 – England win by four wickets Will Jacks shares in key 72-run stand for sixth wicket After the meltdown suffered by England’s footballers in Atl...
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Inter interested in Spence - Friday's gossip
items.summary: Inter Milan work on deals for Djed Spence and Cristian Romero, Liverpool lead the race for Kaishu Sano, Arsenal show interest in Ezri Konsa, plus more.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
